_publications._publicationTitle: Spatial Gene-Expression Profiling Unveils Immuno-oncogenic Programs of NF1-Associated Peripheral Nerve Sheath Tumor Progression.

_contextSnippet: Immunohistochemical staining for CD31 positive blood vessels across PNF, ANNUBP, and MPNST in our dataset was consistent with these findings, demonstrating a significant increase in tumor vascularity in MPNST
details: Immunohistochemical staining for CD31 positive blood vessels demonstrated a significant increase in tumor vascularity in MPNST
